title: 箭艺复兴 Arrow Renaissance
description: 箭艺复兴模组为Minecraft的制箭台添加了功能，你可以用制箭台更经济地合成箭矢  Arrow Renaissance enhances Minecraft's Fletching Table, enabling you to craft arrows more cost-effectively."
body:
**制箭台**可以说是Minecraft中最憋屈的方块之一
这个模组就为它添加了功能。
右键制箭台你可以打开一个界面，
[制箭台界面 The GUI of The Fletching Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8a7207b8b05c9761482da718ed3ad0295ffe113_0.webp)
输入槽1、2、3可用来合成箭矢，从上到下放燧石、木棍、羽毛就可以合成8只箭（是原版工作台的两倍）
输入槽4、5用来给箭矢添加效果，在上方放入任意箭矢，在下方放入药水（无需滞留药水）或萤石粉，
就可以合成药水箭或光灵箭。
你可以同时放64只箭在输入槽4中，只需一瓶药水就可以将它们全部变成药水箭！

**The Fletching Table** is arguably one of the most underutilized blocks in Minecraft.
This mod adds functionality to it.
Right-click on the Fletching Table to open a GUI.
[制箭台界面 The GUI of The Fletching Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8a7207b8b05c9761482da718ed3ad0295ffe113_0.webp)
Input slots 1, 2, and 3 are used for crafting arrows. Place flint, sticks, and feathers from top to bottom to craft 8 arrows (twice as many as the vanilla crafting table).
Input slots 4 and 5 are used for adding effects to arrows. Place any type of arrow in the top slot and a potion (no need for lingering potions) or Glowstone Dust in the bottom slot to craft tipped arrows or spectral arrows.
You can place up to 64 arrows in input slot 4 at once, and convert them all into tipped arrows with just a single potion!
